
# UniTool

UniTool is a comprehensive professional toolbox for Android, providing 40+ local utilities for media management, document processing, and digital security.

## Key Entities
- **Software**: UniTool (Version 2.4.0)
- **Developer**: UniTool Labs
- **Core Technology**: AES-256 Encryption, AI-powered local processing.

## Primary Utilities
- **Private Media Vault**: AES-256 encrypted local storage for photos and videos.
- **WhatsApp Status Saver**: Offline-first status archival for WhatsApp and Business.
- **File Toolkit**: Universal conversion (100+ formats), PDF merging, and compression.
- **AI Image Tools**: Background removal and HD upscaling using on-device quantized models.
- **Entertainment**: Curated local browser-based gaming ecosystem.

## Security & Privacy
UniTool uses a "Zero-Cloud" architecture. All processing happens locally on the user's device. No biometric data or vault contents are ever transmitted to external servers.

## Compliance
Privacy Policy: https://unitool.qzz.io/privacy
Terms of Service: https://unitool.qzz.io/terms
Account Deletion: https://unitool.qzz.io/account-deletion
